en: Please select all that apply. If your company does not hold any of these, select “None".
Does your company hold any of the following professional registrations in Brazil?
CRM – Regional Medical Council (Conselho Regional de Medicina)
CREA – Regional Engineering and Agronomy Council (Conselho Regional de Engenharia e Agronomia)
CRQ – Regional Chemistry Council (Conselho Regional de Química)
CRA – Regional Administration Council (Conselho Regional de Administração)
